modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies total growth for all pets retroactively across all growth sources (feeding, lucky draws, dungeon events, campaigns, special quests)
modifiers.formula: 1% growth multiplier per challenge completed (max 50% at 25/25 challenges); Applied as: Total Growth × (1 + PGC%)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: 50% (1.5x when all 25 PGCs completed)
modifiers.notes: Retroactive and permanent; also multiplies negative growth on certain pets; combines with Magic Egg: 1.5 × 1.3 = 1.95x total

modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies total growth for a single pet when equipped as Tier 4 weapon
modifiers.formula: 1.3x multiplier applied to current growth and dungeon event growth
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: 1.3x per pet (can be removed after evolution requirement met)
modifiers.notes: Can be temporarily equipped to reduce evolution requirements; combines with PGC for up to 1.95x total growth multiplier

modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies all dungeon combat stats (HP, Attack, Defense, Speed) based on accumulated total growth
modifiers.formula: (1 + Total Growth / 200000) applied to combat stats; Every +2,000 growth ≈ +1% to all dungeon stats
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Theoretically unlimited; scales with total growth
modifiers.notes: Example: 200,000 total growth = 2x multiplier; 100,000 growth = 1.5x multiplier; this is the primary mechanism converting growth to combat power

modifiers.displayName: Total Growth Milestones (Permanent Base Growth Addition)
modifiers.whatItAffects: Permanently adds fixed base growth to all pets globally, cumulative with each milestone tier completed
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Stackable: up to +6560 base growth when all milestones completed
modifiers.notes: Permanent and cumulative; independent of individual pets; flows through growth formulas

modifiers.whatItAffects: Adds flat numerical bonuses to all dungeon combat stats for pets on active teams
modifiers.formula: SRMod = (0.1 + Growth_4th/5000) × (1 + Books/0.4800); added additively to base stat formula before class multiplier; for element levels: 1 + (ElementLevel/30) × SRMod (multiplicative)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: 11 levels in Dojo upgrades; theoretically unlimited with sufficient growth and strategy books
modifiers.notes: Growth_4th = 4th-lowest total pet growth among team pets; Books = strategy books in inventory; only applies to pets on active team; can be optimized per class

modifiers.whatItAffects: Increases specific combat stat categories by percentage via Dojo upgrades: Attack, HP, Speed, Speed Damage, elemental bonuses (Water/Fire/Earth/Wind), class training (Physical/Mystic/Battle)
modifiers.formula: +1% per level purchased for each buff type; XP cost: base_cost × (number_already_bought + 1)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Unlimited scaling (diminishing returns on XP cost)
modifiers.notes: Base costs vary: 1M XP (Attack/HP/Speed), 1.5M XP (Speed Damage), 2M XP (Elements and Class training); each buff stacks independently

modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies all equipment stat contributions based on rarity/quality rating
modifiers.formula: Quality multiplier scales 1 (F-grade) to 9 (SSS-grade); Applied as: base_equipment_stats × quality_multiplier × (1 + upgrade_level)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: 9x at SSS quality
modifiers.notes: Quality grades: F=1, E=2, D=3, C=4, B=5, A=6, S=7, SS=8, SSS=9; directly multiplies equipment mod in stat formula

modifiers.whatItAffects: Adds elemental level bonuses to all element types on neutral-element equipment
modifiers.formula: T1-T3 or T5: bonus = (enchantment_level × tier) / 2.2; T4: bonus = enchantment_level × 3.2
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Enchantment max typically E20
modifiers.notes: Non-neutral equipment uses enchantment differently: reduces elemental vulnerabilities by 5% per level (multiplicative, max E20 = 100% vulnerability reduction); elemental bonuses are added to base element levels before Dojo/Strategy Room multipliers

modifiers.whatItAffects: Adds bonus stats to element levels when gems are attached to equipment
modifiers.formula: Neutral gems: (1 × gem_level × equipment_tier) added to all element stats; Element-specific gems: (1% × gem_level × equipment_tier) bonus applied to corresponding stat (Health for Water, Attack for Fire, etc.)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Scales with gem level (1-20+) and equipment tier (1-5)
modifiers.notes: Gems persist when upgrading to higher tier equipment; combined with enchantments and Dojo element buffs; specific element gems provide focused stat bonuses beyond element levels

modifiers.whatItAffects: Increases elemental damage levels for dungeons via Dojo upgrades
modifiers.formula: +1% per level purchased to each element's damage multiplier in combat; Applied multiplicatively: (1 + A/100) / (1 + D_elem/100) in damage calculation
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Unlimited scaling
modifiers.notes: Base cost: 2M XP per element; works on top of equipment enchantments, gems, and base pet element levels; affects both attacker advantage and defender weakness calculations

modifiers.whatItAffects: Determines base elemental stats for each pet species before equipment/training bonuses
modifiers.formula: Neutral pets: 0.75 × DL for each element; Non-neutral pets: primary_element = 50 + 3×DL, weak_element = -50, others = 0
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Scales with Dungeon Level (DL)
modifiers.notes: Equipment enchantments and gems are added to these base values; weakness cycle: Water > Fire > Wind > Earth > Water

modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies pet growth gained from growth campaigns and exploration campaigns
modifiers.formula: growth_gain = hours × (log15(total_growth) - 1.75) × pet_ability_multi × UPC_multi; awarded to lowest-growth pet in group
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Scales logarithmically with total growth; approaches asymptote
modifiers.notes: log15 represents base-15 logarithm; pet_ability_multi and UPC_multi are separate multipliers from abilities and upgrades; only lowest-growth pet in campaign receives the growth

modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies campaign effectiveness and growth based on pet evolution requirements and class level
modifiers.formula: Class_Bonus = ((growth_required_for_evolution / 50000) + 1) × 0.5; Many pets also display campaign multipliers as 0.5% × CL percentage
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Scales with evolution requirement and class level (CL up to 100)
modifiers.notes: Higher-requirement evolutions grant better campaign multipliers; independent of individual pet species

modifiers.displayName: Dojo Master and Pupil Growth Boost
modifiers.whatItAffects: Increases pet growth rate through Dojo Master channeling and pupil training
modifiers.formula: Master boost: 0.01 × (Master_CL - 50); Pupil growth: (current_Dojo_XP)^0.2 × (Master_CL_bonuses) / 100 per hour
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Two Masters possible at Dojo level 11; scales with Master Class Level (50+)
modifiers.notes: Requires CL 50+ volunteers as Masters; XP accumulation scales with Master's Class Level; Dojo pupils gain growth based on accumulated XP at the Dojo

modifiers.whatItAffects: Increases HP class multiplier for Defender-class pets beyond CL 25
modifiers.formula: Base Defender ClassMod_HP = 1.20; Above CL 25: ClassMod_HP = 1.20 + max(0, (CL - 25) / 100)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: CL 100 → ClassMod_HP = 1.95x
modifiers.notes: Only applies to Defender class pets; enhances tank survivability in endgame; standard ClassMod for Defenders at CL 25 and below is 1.20

modifiers.whatItAffects: Individual pet species provide unique growth multipliers and modifiers based on specific mechanics
modifiers.formula: Variable by species. Examples: Gold Dragon multiplies food growth by (# Pets - 1) × 0.25; Chocobear adds 50% camp bonus when fed chocolate; Lizard converts half discovered food to growth; Sloth adds camp hours × 10% (max 120%); Vampire adds Sqrt(Total Growth) to crafting speed
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Varies by pet species
modifiers.stacking: multiplicative or additive depending on pet
modifiers.notes: Requires specific pets in team/camp; mechanics range from direct growth multiplication to indirect bonuses (e.g., Mysterious Egg shadow clone XP +2% × CL, max 100% at CL 50); Llysnafedda provides Experience × (1 + CL × 0.19), max 1000% at CL 100

modifiers.whatItAffects: Adds bonus Speed to pets positioned in front row of dungeon team
modifiers.formula: +20% Speed bonus applied to front-row pets; affects SpeedDamage calculation: (Attacker_Speed - Defender_Speed) / 2
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: 20% flat bonus to speed stat
modifiers.notes: Back-row pets receive 20% speed penalty (except Mages and Snipers which are exempt); affects multi-action threshold chances in combat

modifiers.whatItAffects: Reduces damage dealt by back-row pets except Mages and Snipers
modifiers.formula: 0.80x multiplier to back-row pet damage output (80% of normal damage)
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: 20% reduction flat
modifiers.notes: Mages and Snipers are exempt from this penalty; front-row pets get +20% speed instead of damage penalty; affects position strategy

modifiers.whatItAffects: Multiplies pet stat gains from all sources when TGC challenge is active
modifiers.formula: Challenge goal: Earn 10,000 + (3,000 × challenges_completed) total growth across all pets; Multiplier magnitude not explicitly documented
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Infinitely repeatable; exponential growth goal scaling
modifiers.notes: Growth from new pet unlocks does not count toward challenge; mentioned alongside PGC, Space Dimension, Strategy Room, and Dojo as growth multiplier sources; specific formula not yet documented

modifiers.whatItAffects: Increases XP earned from dungeons and other activities, indirectly accelerating pet training and class level progression
modifiers.formula: Dungeon XP Gain: +1% per level; Other XP Gain: +1% per level; Base cost: 2M XP each
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Unlimited scaling
modifiers.notes: Supports faster progression through DL and CL; separate upgrade lines for dungeon vs other XP; not a direct combat stat modifier but critical for progression

modifiers.displayName: Pet Stats to God Stat Bonus Conversion
modifiers.whatItAffects: Grants percentage bonuses to player God's equivalent stats (Physical, Mystic, Battle) based on pet training stats
modifiers.formula: 0.01% bonus per pet stat point; Equivalently: 1% God bonus per 100 pet stats; feeds into rebirth multiplier scaling
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: Relates to rebirth multiplier cap of 999%
modifiers.notes: Basis for rebirth multiplier scaling in endgame progression; pet stats become increasingly valuable as players approach rebirth

modifiers.whatItAffects: Reduces damage taken by entire team when Supporter pet reaches CL 50+
modifiers.formula: Up to ~50% team-wide damage reduction at CL 50+
modifiers.maxLevelOrCap: CL 50 minimum for significant reduction
modifiers.notes: Single most impactful high-end dungeon ability; makes Supporter class priority for advanced teams; scales with Supporter's Class Level
